message:

# The io.tcl sources relative to $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR) which should be the parent dir.
# Let's check:
head -20 /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/common/io.tcl 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.

source $::env(_TCL_ENV_IN)
source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/set_global_connections.tcl

proc string_in_file {file_path substring} {
    set f [open $file_path r]
    set data [read $f]
    close $f

extras.command:
